overall.description: Static game engine footage of a medieval stone bedroom interior illuminated by warm candlelight. The scene features wooden furniture, rough stone walls, and exposed ceiling beams with no camera movement or activity occurring throughout the clip.

segments.scene_description: The camera remains completely stationary throughout this segment, capturing a medieval stone bedroom interior. Warm candlelight from wall-mounted iron sconces illuminates the rough stone walls, wooden furniture including a bed with yellow bedding, and exposed ceiling beams. No movement, events, or changes occur in the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a completely static perspective within a medieval stone bedroom, preserving a singular, unchanging mood of quiet solitude. It begins by capturing the rough texture of stone walls and exposed ceiling beams under the soft glow of wall-mounted iron sconces. As the camera holds its position, the warm candlelight continues to illuminate the wooden furniture and a bed draped in yellow bedding. The scene remains frozen in this state, with no shifts in lighting or movement to disrupt the stillness. Finally, the view lingers on the interior's rustic details, concluding without any change to the environment.
